rules: Nets are turned completely backwards (facing the wall).
Field players MUST use their hands to strike the ball (no grabbing, catching, or picking it up).
Goalies CANNOT use their hands! They must use their feet or body to block the ball.
No traditional soccer kicking allowed by field players.

daily_plan.title: Workout & Match Day
daily_plan.desc:
1. Daily workout (unrelated to game).
2. Rule Explanation: Everything is backwards!
3. Split: Competitive League plays in the Main Gym. Rec League plays in the Aux Gym.
